name: Google Workspace Privileged Accounts Stale (30 days)
description: Detects privileged google_workspace accounts with stale login activity.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login_time AS last_login FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND (u.last_login_time IS NULL OR u.last_login_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review privileged stale accounts immediately; remove excessive privileges or disable unused access.
